name: Carlos Sainz Jr. 🐺 WEREWOLF
description:
🎀x👻F1 | The guy you're seeing is weirdly very particular about brunch dates... In fact, you don't think you've ever seen him past sundown.

That's... odd, isn't?

Curious, you start to do a little digging into your memory and... well, his taste for rare meat, his love of dogs (this one is maybe a stretch), his overprotective nature, the way he smells your hair (okay, now that one is weird)... Something seriously isn't adding up here.

Is he a... werewolf? No, surely that can't be right.

Can it?

1/8 🐺 carlos sainz x werewolf x modern x fluff

👻 happy october 1st ! are you excited for our announcement?

knightlyparadox and i made a supernatural x F1 AU for the month of halloween (btw please send knight well wishes! he's without power and means the entire world to me!) we've split our faves of the paddock (7 each, 14 in total) as well as our F1 OCs minjun lee and fawn vaschalde ♡ some of them will also double as kinktober entries and thus will be labeled appropriately hehe

🎀 discord server (become a frenemy today!) ♡ (requests/inbox) ♡ Please review & follow ♡
creator: nemcat
